jsonLd.title: Gati is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Gati. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Warehouse Manager to strengthen our Navi Mumbai-based team.

About Gati:
Gati is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in Route Optimization

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Referral bonus program
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Gati!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
